items.description: List of interviewee context rows to create. Each item has an `interviewee_identifier` and an `agent_context`. At most 500 items per request.

agent_context.description: Extra context the voice agent should know about this specific interviewee — e.g. 'uses the replay product but has never used summarization'.

interviewee_identifier.description: Identifier for the interviewee — typically an email address or PostHog distinct ID. Must match a value in the parent topic's interviewee_emails or interviewee_distinct_ids.
